settings.enabled_help: Allow users to rate discussions with a 5-star system.
settings.show_on_list_help: Display the star rating on the discussion list (home page). When off, ratings still appear on the discussion page. Enabled by default.
settings.rate_on_list_label: Allow rating from the discussion list
settings.rate_on_list_help: Let users rate topics directly from the discussion list by clicking the stars (with hover preview), just like on the discussion page. When off, the list shows the rating read-only. Enabled by default.
settings.allow_unactivated_help: When enabled, users who haven't confirmed their email can still rate discussions.

support.title: Support This Extension
support.description: If you find this extension useful, please consider supporting its development with a small donation. Every contribution helps keep the project alive and maintained.

tooltip.login_required: You must be logged in to rate.
tooltip.activation_required: You must activate your account to rate.

controls.reset_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete all ratings for this discussion? This cannot be undone.

reset_modal.title: Reset All Ratings
reset_modal.message: Are you sure you want to delete all {count} rating(s) for this discussion? This action cannot be undone.
